completeMessage: The inventory simulation packet recording is complete. Leave the game so the final scenario_end marker is written.
notes: This is a human-operated packet capture scenario for inventory simulation.
Decode packet ids 30, 46, 47, 49, 50, 147, and 148 after recording.
Each step marker bounds one visible user action or one intentionally-fast chain.
Read-ahead text is included because inventory and container screens can hide the next prompt.
After each listed action, pause briefly for the scenario to advance before continuing with the next read-ahead action.

instructions: READ BEFORE OPENING INVENTORY - P1 then P2:
1. Open your inventory and left-click the dirt stack so all 7 dirt are on your cursor.
2. Pause briefly for this step to complete. Keep the inventory open if possible.
3. Next prompt may be hidden: left-click an empty hotbar slot to place the full dirt stack.
Do not do action 3 until this P1 step has completed.
Continue the P1/P2 read-ahead sequence.
With the dirt still on your cursor, left-click an empty hotbar slot to place the full stack.
Pause after the click so this step can complete.
READ BEFORE OPENING INVENTORY - P3 through P5:
1. Open your inventory and right-click the dirt stack so the larger half is on your cursor.
2. After P3 completes, right-click one empty slot once. Keep any remaining dirt on your cursor.
3. After P4 completes, left-click the one-dirt stack to merge the cursor back into it.
Do not do action 2 until this P3 step has completed.
Continue the P3-P5 read-ahead sequence.
With the split dirt still on your cursor, right-click one empty slot once.
Keep any remaining dirt on your cursor, then pause for this step to complete.
Continue the P3-P5 read-ahead sequence.
With dirt still on your cursor, left-click the one-dirt stack you just created.
The cursor should merge into that compatible stack. Pause after the click.
READ BEFORE OPENING INVENTORY - all actions are in this step:
1. Open your inventory and left-click the diamond stack to put it on your cursor.
2. Left-click the stick stack so diamond and stick swap.
3. Left-click an empty slot to place whatever remains on your cursor.
Pause after action 3 so this step can complete.
READ BEFORE OPENING INVENTORY - all actions are in this step:
1. Open your inventory and left-click the stick stack to put all 5 sticks on your cursor.
2. Left-click outside the inventory to drop the full cursor stack.
Pause after the outside click.
READ BEFORE OPENING INVENTORY - all actions are in this step:
1. Open your inventory and left-click the stick stack to put all 5 sticks on your cursor.
2. Right-click outside the inventory once to drop one item from the cursor.
Pause after the outside click.
READ BEFORE OPENING INVENTORY:
Open your inventory, hover the dirt stack, and press the normal drop-one key once.
Pause after the key press.
READ BEFORE OPENING INVENTORY - creative mode:
1. Open your inventory and pick up the diamond stack.
2. Destroy/delete the cursor stack using the creative inventory delete/drop target.
Pause after deleting the cursor stack.
READ BEFORE OPENING INVENTORY - fast chain in one step:
As fast as possible, left-click the dirt stack and then left-click an empty slot.
This step is intended to show whether the client sends one request, two requests, or an unconfirmed prediction.
READ BEFORE OPENING INVENTORY - fast chain in one step:
As fast as possible: right-click the dirt stack, right-click an empty slot once, then left-click that new dirt stack.
This should capture chained predictions and any unconfirmed stack-id behavior.
READ BEFORE OPENING INVENTORY - 2x2 manual crafting:
1. Open your player inventory and manually put the oak log into the 2x2 crafting grid.
2. Take the oak planks result into your inventory.
Pause after the planks are in your inventory.
READ BEFORE OPENING INVENTORY - 2x2 recipe book crafting:
Open your player inventory, use the recipe book to craft all possible oak planks from the two oak logs, then leave the planks in your inventory.
Pause after the planks are created.
READ BEFORE OPENING CRAFTING TABLE - C3 then C4:
1. Open the crafting table in front of you.
2. After C3 completes, manually craft a wooden pickaxe: 3 planks across the top row, 1 stick in the center, 1 stick below it.
3. Take the wooden pickaxe result into your inventory.
Continue the C3/C4 read-ahead sequence.
Manually place 3 oak planks and 2 sticks into the crafting table recipe for a wooden pickaxe.
Take the wooden pickaxe result into your inventory, then pause.
READ BEFORE OPENING CHEST - H1 through H5:
1. Open the chest in front of you.
2. After H1 completes, move the full diamond stack from your inventory into chest slot 0.
3. After H2 completes, move exactly 3 dirt from your inventory into an empty chest slot.
4. After H3 completes, move the diamond stack from chest slot 0 back into an empty player inventory slot.
5. After H4 completes, merge the remaining player dirt stack with the dirt stack in the chest.
Keep the chest open between these steps and pause briefly after each action.
Continue the H1-H5 read-ahead sequence.
Move the full diamond stack from your inventory into chest slot 0.
This should include both the pickup and the placement into the chest. Pause after the stack is in the chest.
Continue the H1-H5 read-ahead sequence.
Move exactly 3 dirt from your inventory into an empty chest slot.
This should include both the pickup/split and the placement into the chest. Pause after the dirt is in the chest.
Continue the H1-H5 read-ahead sequence.
Move the diamond stack from chest slot 0 back into an empty player inventory slot.
This should include both the pickup from the chest and placement into your inventory. Pause after the stack is back in your inventory.
Continue the H1-H5 read-ahead sequence.
Merge the remaining player dirt stack with the dirt stack in the chest.
Use the normal UI drag/click behavior you would use to combine the stacks, then pause after the cursor is empty.
READ BEFORE OPENING CHEST - all actions are in this step:
1. Open the chest.
2. Move the diamond stack into chest slot 0.
3. Swap that chest diamond stack with the stick stack in your inventory.
Leave the chest open and pause when the swap is done.
READ BEFORE OPENING CHEST - all actions are in this step:
1. Open the chest.
2. Move the diamond stack from your inventory into chest slot 0.
3. Move the same diamond stack from chest slot 0 to another empty chest slot.
Pause after action 3.
READ BEFORE OPENING CHEST - all actions are in this step:
1. Open the chest.
2. Move the diamond stack into chest slot 0.
3. Pick up the chest diamond stack onto your cursor.
4. Close the chest while still carrying the diamond stack.
Pause after closing the chest.
